title: leria albicans
intro: Leria albicans, also known as white clover, is a perennial legume plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Leria albicans include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Leria albicans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
